name: spiel
description: Listen to any article with a natural AI voice that runs 100% locally. Free, private, open-source text-to-speech for Chrome.
author: Harpreet Vishnoi

scripts.build:scripts: npm run build:bg && npm run build:content && npm run build:offscreen && npm run build:pdf
scripts.icons: mkdir -p dist/icons && cp assets/icons/icon16.png assets/icons/icon48.png assets/icons/icon128.png dist/icons/
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:scripts && npm run icons && npm run copy:popup && npm run copy:offscreen && npm run copy:worker && npm run copy:manifest && npm run verify:build
scripts.dev: npm run build && echo '\nDone! Load the dist/ folder as an unpacked extension in Chrome.'
scripts.package: npm run build && rm -f spiel-extension.zip && cd dist && zip -rq ../spiel-extension.zip . -x '.DS_Store' '*/.DS_Store' && cd .. && echo 'Created spiel-extension.zip'
